lines.english: Day and night, Nanak meditates on the Naam.
Gond, Fifth Mehl:
Through the Lord's Name, he is blessed with peace, poise and bliss. ||4||4||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee moorat man meh dhiaan |
lines.english: Meditate on the image of the Guru within your mind;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad mantru man maan |
lines.english: let your mind accept the Word of the Guru's Shabad, and His Mantra.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਰਿਦੈ ਲੈ ਧਾਰਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur ke charan ridai lai dhaarau |
lines.english: Enshrine the Guru's feet within your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਉਤਰਸਿ ਪਾਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur bin koe na utaras paar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Guru, no one can cross over. ||1||Pause||
Let no one wander in doubt in the world.
Bow in humility forever before the Guru, the Supreme Lord God. ||1||
The Guru shows the Path to those who have wandered off.
He leads them to renounce others, and attaches them to devotional worship of the Lord.
He obliterates the fear of birth and death.
The glorious greatness of the Perfect Guru is endless. ||2||
and the Light shines forth in the darkness.
By Guru's Grace, the inverted heart-lotus blossoms forth,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਆ ਸੋ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jin keea so gur te jaaniaa |
lines.english: Through the Guru, know the One who created you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਮੁਗਧ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te mugadh man maaniaa |3|
lines.english: By the Guru's Mercy, the foolish mind comes to believe. ||3||
The Guru is the Creator; the Guru has the power to do everything.
Says Nanak, God has inspired me to know this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਭਾਈ ॥੪॥੫॥੭॥
lines.translit: bin gur mukat na paaeeai bhaaee |4|5|7|
lines.english: Without the Guru, liberation is not obtained, O Siblings of Destiny. ||4||5||7||
The Guru is the Transcendent Lord; He is, and always shall be.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰਿ ਮਨ ਮੋਰ ॥
lines.translit: guroo guroo gur kar man mor |
lines.english: Chant Guru, Guru, Guru, O my mind.
I have no other than the Guru.
Gond, Fifth Mehl:
Know that the Guru and the Transcendent Lord are One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਮੇਟੈ ਦਾਤਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jaa kee koe na mettai daat |1|
lines.english: No one can decrease His bounty. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaavai so paravaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Whatever pleases Him is acceptable and approved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਟੇਕ ਰਹਹੁ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee ttek rahahu din raat |
lines.english: I lean upon the Support of the Guru, day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੁ ਦਰਦੁ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਭਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: dookh darad bhram taa kaa bhaagai |
lines.english: his pains, sufferings and doubts run away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur charanee jaa kaa man laagai |
lines.english: One whose mind is attached to the Guru's feet
Serving the Guru, honor is obtained.
Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan, I am exalted.
I am forever a sacrifice to the Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਕੀ ਪੂਰਨ ਘਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: gur ke sevak kee pooran ghaal |
lines.english: The work of the Guru's servant is perfect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਕਥਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee mahimaa kathan na jaae |
lines.english: The Guru's glory cannot be described.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਕਉ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਬਿਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur ke sevak kau dukh na biaapai |
lines.english: Pain does not afflict the Guru's servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਦਹ ਦਿਸਿ ਜਾਪੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sevak deh dis jaapai |3|
lines.english: The Guru's servant is famous in the ten directions. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਗ ॥੪॥੬॥੮॥
lines.translit: gur charanee taa kaa man laag |4|6|8|
lines.english: - his mind is attached to the Guru's feet. ||4||6||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਪੂਰੇ ਭਾਗ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jaa ke poore bhaag |
lines.english: Says Nanak, one who is blessed with perfect destiny
The Guru remains absorbed in the Supreme Lord God.
My Guru is divine, invisible and mysterious.
Gond, Fifth Mehl:
I worship and adore my Guru; the Guru is the Lord of the Universe.
My Guru is the Supreme Lord God; the Guru is the Lord God.
I serve at the Guru's feet, which are worshipped by all. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਮੈ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur bin avar naahee mai thaau |
lines.english: Without the Guru, I have no other place at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਜਪਉ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰ ਨਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anadin jpau guroo gur naau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Night and day, I chant the Name of Guru, Guru. ||1||Pause||
The Guru is the Lord of the World, the Primal Being, the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur meraa giaan gur ridai dhiaan |
lines.english: The Guru is my spiritual wisdom, the Guru is the meditation within my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਿ ਰਹਉ ਕਰ ਜੋਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee saran rhau kar jor |
lines.english: With my palms pressed together, I remain in the Guru's Sanctuary.
The Guru is the boat to cross over the terrifying world-ocean.
Without the Guru, I have no other at all. ||2||
With the Guru, all are saved. ||3||
Serving the Guru, one is released from the Messenger of Death.
In the darkness, the Guru's Mantra shines forth.
Nanak is the Guru; Nanak is the Lord Himself. ||4||7||9||
The Perfect Guru is found, by great good fortune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਮੇਟੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad na mettai koe |
lines.english: No one can erase the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee sevaa dookh na laagee |
lines.english: Serving the Guru, pain does not afflict anyone.
